disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden onset of severe lower-pelvic cramping about 3 hours ago that has since largely eased.
trigger_question_examples: Can you tell me what happened and when the pain started?
How is the pain now compared with when it started?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It came on out of nowhere about three hours ago, really sharp cramping low down. It was horrible at first but it has settled a lot since — it's just a dull ache now.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No abnormal vaginal bleeding — no intermenstrual, post-coital or post-menopausal bleeding.
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any bleeding that isn't normal for you — between periods, after sex, or any new bleeding?
Any heavy vaginal bleeding right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, no strange bleeding at all — nothing between periods or after sex, and I'm not bleeding heavily now.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever, chills or abnormal/foul-smelling vaginal discharge.
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any fever, chills, or a change in vaginal discharge?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fevers or chills, and no unusual or smelly discharge.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Cervical screening is significantly overdue and the patient is highly anxious about a missed cancer.
trigger_question_examples: When did you last have a cervical screening test or Pap smear?
What are you most worried about?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm years overdue for my smear — I keep putting it off and now I'm terrified I've left it too long and there's something growing.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Reproductive-age person with a cervix; pregnancy status not established by the patient.
trigger_question_examples: Is there any chance you could be pregnant?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I honestly don't know — I haven't done a pregnancy test. I hadn't even thought about that.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Marked daytime clinic avoidance due to severe agoraphobia and health anxiety.
trigger_question_examples: What has made it hard to get the screening done before now?
How do you feel about going in to a clinic?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I get really panicky about going into clinics, especially during the day — that's a big part of why I've avoided the smear for so long.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I'd just rather not talk about the anxiety side of it, can we focus on the pain?

trigger_question_examples: Do you know if you've had the HPV vaccine?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm not sure if I ever got the HPV vaccine, to be honest.
